meta.title: China's Crony Capitalism: Kleptocracy with Chinese Characteristics
meta.description: Minxin Pei, Richard McGregor, Andrew Wedeman, Evan Osnos, and Charles Davidson discuss China’s Crony Capitalism and kleptocracy in China. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
